headline: Software stocks teased a comeback — but investors still want proof
summary: One week after staging their sharpest rebound in nearly a year, software stocks are fading again.

headline: Consumer Tech News (Mar 9-13): Trump Administration Sues California Over Emissions Targets, Nvidia Announces $26B AI Investment & More
